plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-555 RP18.P02.M03.S01-RP18.P02.M04.S10 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-555 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP18.P02 implementation slice: the full M03 Primary Implementation Slice cycle (thirty rows) and the M04 Secondary Workflow Slice head (the first ten rows) as two descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H18), Claude review packet (C18), and CP00-556 handoff, without opening AI legal workflows, precedent, clause markup, or DD extraction runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-555 is a clean descriptor-only pack covering exactly the 40 planned RP18 units (RP18.P02.M03.S01-RP18.P02.M04.S10, risk B), faithfully mirroring the established and already-committed CP00-551..CP00-554 pattern. Independent read-only inspection confirms: (1) Coverage/distribution integrity — registry binding, service descriptors, validators, the contract JSON (current_pack, historical_pack_bindings tail at CP00-555, p02_implementation_slice_descriptor, cp555_requirements, cp555_no_write_attestation), test suite, and the validate script all agree on 40 units, deliverable distribution {contract:2,implementation:20,security_audit:4,ui:4,claude_review:2,failure_recovery:2,test:4,fixture:1,hermes_evidence:1}, and micro split {M03:30,M04:10}; the validator enforces strict deepEqual between the contract file and registry-derived descriptors. (2) No-write/no-real-data boundaries — every descriptor and no_write_attestation sets descriptor_only, synthetic_only, no_real_data, writes_product_state:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false, evaluates_runtime_permission:false, no state/idempotency/lock/audit writes, and full leak guards. (3) Authority boundary — claude_is_final_approval:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false everywhere; Claude remains a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob), not the final approver. (4) Hermes is used only for the deterministic H18 evidence packet/receipt, not product runtime (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false). (5) No over-claim — manifest/plan/command-evidence report production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor; only production_ready_candidate (coverage+slice validity) is asserted, and the descriptor-verified flag is genuinely supported by source. (6) CP178+ review hardening — readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid-JSON stdout, non-zero), forbidden_review_evidence enumerates auth-failure/zero-byte/malformed-JSON/fenced-JSON/tool-call-shaped/missing-field rejection, and the review is correctly pending with post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) not yet produced. No P0/P1/P2 issues found. One benign P3 data-hygiene note in the generated scope file. This does not block pack or goal closeout.

findings.title: changed-file-scope dual-labels the pack's own docs directory as unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-555/ (and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md) appear in BOTH untracked_implementation_files (lines 152-153) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 158-159). The cp00-555/ directory holds this pack's own manifest.json and command-evidence.json, so tagging it 'unrelated_dirty_files_preserved' is cosmetically inconsistent. There is no closeout impact: active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, the directory is correctly preserved as untracked, and it will be committed with the pack. The prompt directive to not infer unrelated dirty files as in-scope is still satisfiable because the active_pack_implementation_refs list is authoritative and excludes the genuinely unrelated UI-workstream files (scripts/progress-control-room-data.mjs, tools/progress-control-room/index.html).
findings.recommendation: Optionally refine the changed-file-scope generator so the pack's own docs/closeout-packs/<pack>/ directory is not simultaneously tagged unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. No action required for CP00-555 closeout.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accepted as non-blocking informational; does not affect the descriptor-only boundary, the production_ready claim, Claude's read-only authority boundary, or review-evidence integrity.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-555 ai legal workflows core p02 implementation slice descriptor pack
